problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
